## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (e.g. "Closes #12"). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`node --test`)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (the zero-dependency invariant)
- [ ] Added a changeset if user-facing (`npx changeset`)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
- [ ] If this touches the **manifest schema** or **agent protocol**, it was discussed in an issue first and docs are updated
